title: Tropical Nullstellensatz Applied to Hodge Setting

kapranov_original.description: Tropical Nullstellensatz: tropicalization of variety = tropical variety
kapranov_original.reason: Tropical shadow of algebraic is tropical algebraic -- EML-2 map

tropical_surjectivity.description: Does every tropical Hodge class have a tropical cycle preimage?

classical_tropical_bridge.description: Classical Hodge class -> tropical shadow -> tropical cycle -> lift?
classical_tropical_bridge.reason: Lifting step requires crossing EML-inf barrier

nullstellensatz_forcing.description: Tropical Nullstellensatz: every tropical hypersurface = tropicalization
nullstellensatz_forcing.reason: Forces existence of classical preimage for hypersurfaces

codimension_obstacle.reason: Known obstruction -- full surjectivity not forced by current tools
